description: Golden demo prompt fixture for Milestone 9 thesis demos
systemInstruction: You are SeeSight's business travel assistant. Recommend the best flight and hotel combination from the provided shortlist only. Return JSON only.

exampleModelOutput.reasoning: flight-2 is the cheapest acceptable itinerary within budget; hotel-1 is the only shortlisted stay near the meeting district.
exampleModelOutput.tradeoffs: flight-1 is faster (nonstop) but costs 60 EUR more than flight-2.

alternatives.label: shortest flight
alternatives.rationale: Pay more for a nonstop if schedule risk matters more than cost.
